hooks.command: if [ "${VIDEO_SNAG_RETRO_HOOK_DISABLED:-0}" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; c=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if printf "%s" "$c" | grep -Eq "(^|[;&|]) *([A-Z_]+=[^ ]* )*(npm run render|npx (--yes )?hyperframes(@[^ ]*)?( lambda)? render)"; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "SNAG RETRO (automated hook): a HyperFrames render ran this session. Before you end the session, PREPEND a new dated entry to projects/video-production/render-qa/snag-log.md per its header rules: (1) Open list \u2014 OWNER-ACTIONABLE items only: roll forward only what genuinely needs the human (a decision, a credential, or access); anything you can fix yourself, FIX THIS SESSION instead of rolling it. If the Open list is non-empty, DIRECTLY ASK the human to resolve each item at close-out (AskUserQuestion when interactive) instead of filing it in the log for them to find. (2) Fixed this session \u2014 tagged [env]/[tooling]/[authoring]/[upstream]/[defect] with resolution + time cost. (3) Promoted to docs \u2014 durable lessons go into the owning doc (skill command block, frame.md, or a preflight/verify check) in this same session, not into the log."}}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Render detected → write snag-log retro before session end (set VIDEO_SNAG_RETRO_HOOK_DISABLED=1 to silence)
